summary: Implemented CodebaseMemory main class with repo registry for opencode-codebase-memory. Configurable stateDir (constructor param) for test isolation. Methods: analyze() indexes repo via Indexer and registers in repos.json, query() FTS search across symbols, context() returns symbol node + callers/callees, impact() blast radius via recursive CTE, detectChanges() mtime-based change detection, enrichErrorContext() extracts symbol names from error text and looks up across repos, listRepos() enumerates all registered repos. Registry persists to {stateDir}/repos.json. 16 tests covering all methods including persistence, error handling, and edge cases.
